You can view the times and dates down below."},{"url":"https://tech.yahoo.com/gaming/articles/duskbloods-network-test-dates-announced-144439385.html","title":"The Duskbloods network test dates announced – how to register","content":"2 days ago — The network test has just been announced to be running from August 21 to August 23, 2026. Registrations for the network test will open on July ...
Elden Ring developer From Software's next big game, The Duskbloods, is set to be released exclusively on the Nintendo Switch 2 later this year, and the company is letting players try it out next month ahead of the game's launch.
From Software previously announced a network test for the highly anticipated Switch 2 game, which will allow players to try some parts of the game early entirely for free.
Registrations for the network test will open on July 22, 2026, and there will be a limit on how many participants will be allowed during the test.
The full details for the network test and its registration can be found below.
Starting from July 22 at 7:00am PDT, players will be able to register for The Duskbloods network test on the official registration website for the game."},{"url":"https://famiboards.com/threads/the-duskbloods-closed-network-test-registration-starts-july-22nd-network-test-from-august-21st-24th.17728/","title":"The Duskbloods Closed Network Test registration starts July 22nd, Network Test from August 21st - 24th (Check threadmark for details) | Famiboards","content":"News The Duskbloods Closed Network Test registration starts July 22nd, Network Test from August 21st - 24th (Check threadmark for details)
They did closed network test for Elden Ring Nightreign too and it came out 3 months later.
The Elden Ring and Nightrein network tests took place within 2-3 months of the full game release.
Open means anyone can play it until it’s over.
Hopefully Brazil is included in the test.
Participant application begins on July 22nd.
The Closed Network Test will take place at the dates and times shown below.
The online tests for Elden Ring and Nightreign both happened 3 months before release."},{"url":"https://www.vice.com/en/article/the-duskbloods-network-test-dates/","title":"The Duskbloods Network Test Dates Revealed – How to Sign Up and Beta Schedule","content":"FromSoftware has officially revealed The Duskbloods Network Test dates for Nintendo Switch 2.
Here is when The Duskbloods Network Test goes live in every region, how to sign up, and everything you need to know before applications open.
FromSoftware has announced that the closed beta will take place across five sessions, with additional rounds scheduled for August 22 and August 23.
To sign up for The Duskbloods Network Test, simply visit the official website when applications open on July 22 and select your specific region.
The network test for The Duskbloods allows for up to eight players to participate together in each of the multiplayer matches while the game is still in development.
FromSoftware also confirmed that Network Test participants won’t be selected until August 7, 2026, at 6 AM PT / 9 AM ET.
If you’re hoping to get early access, be sure to submit your application when registrations open on July 22 and keep an eye on your email after the selection period ends."},{"url":"https://gamingtrend.com/news/the-duskbloods-closed-network-test-takes-place-late-august-2026/","title":"The Duskbloods Closed Network Test takes place late August 2026","content":"Registration opens Wednesday, July 22, and interested players can sign up through the official network test website at campaign.theduskbloods.jp.
